fields.title: Galactic Odyssey
fields.description: A crew of astronauts embarks on a perilous journey beyond the known universe, discovering ancient civilizations and facing impossible choices that will determine the fate of humanity. A breathtaking space epic filled with stunning visuals and emotional depth.

fields.title: The Last Detective
fields.description: A retired detective is pulled back into action when a series of mysterious disappearances shakes a quiet coastal town. As secrets unravel, he discovers the town's darkest truth has been hiding in plain sight for decades.

fields.title: Monsoon Wedding Bells
fields.description: A heartwarming romantic comedy set during a lavish Indian wedding. Two strangers are accidentally seated together and spend the entire celebration falling in love amidst family drama, missing caterers, and a surprise rainstorm.

fields.title: Iron Fist: Reborn
fields.description: After being betrayed by his own team, a special forces operative goes off the grid to expose a global conspiracy. Featuring jaw-dropping action sequences filmed across six countries and a twist nobody saw coming.

fields.title: Laugh Track
fields.description: A failed stand-up comedian accidentally goes viral after a disastrous open-mic night. Now suddenly famous for all the wrong reasons, he must decide whether to embrace the chaos or fight for the act he actually believes in.

fields.title: Hollow House
fields.description: A family moves into a centuries-old mansion only to realise they are not its only residents. As paranormal events escalate, they uncover the tragic story of the original inhabitants — and why they never left.
